mapper.select: SELECT urf.resume_id AS resumeId, COALESCE(NULLIF(rp.resume_name, ''), urf.file_name) AS resumeName, urf.file_name AS fileName, urf.file_ext AS fileExt, COALESCE( NULLIF(urf.content_type, ''), CASE WHEN LOWER(urf.file_ext) = 'pdf' THEN 'application/pdf' WHEN LOWER(urf.file_ext) = 'doc' THEN 'application/msword' WHEN LOWER(urf.file_ext) = 'docx' THEN 'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document' ELSE 'application/octet-stream' END ) AS contentType, CASE WHEN LOWER(urf.file_ext) = 'pdf' OR COALESCE(NULLIF(urf.content_type, ''), '') = 'application/pdf' THEN 'INLINE' ELSE 'DOWNLOAD' END AS previewType, COALESCE(rar.update_time, rp.update_time, urf.update_time) AS updatedAt, CASE WHEN rp.id IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE CAST(JSON_OBJECT( 'name', rp.name, 'title', rp.title, 'email', rp.email, 'phone', rp.phone, 'location', rp.location, 'linkedinText', rp.linkedin_text, 'linkedinUrl', rp.linkedin_url, 'githubText', rp.github_text, 'githubUrl', rp.github_url, 'otherLinkText', rp.other_link_text, 'otherLinkUrl', rp.other_link_url, 'status', rp.status ) AS CHAR) END AS profileJson, CAST(JSON_OBJECT( 'scoreValue', COALESCE(rar.score_value, CAST(urf.score AS SIGNED)), 'scoreGrade', COALESCE( NULLIF(rar.score_grade, ''), CASE WHEN COALESCE(rar.score_value, CAST(urf.score AS SIGNED)) IS NULL OR COALESCE(rar.score_value, CAST(urf.score AS SIGNED)) >= 85 THEN 'A' WHEN COALESCE(rar.score_value, CAST(urf.score AS SIGNED)) >= 70 THEN 'B' ELSE 'C' END ), 'scoreLevel', COALESCE( NULLIF(rar.score_level, ''), CASE WHEN COALESCE(rar.score_value, CAST(urf.score AS SIGNED)) IS NULL OR COALESCE(rar.score_value, CAST(urf.score AS SIGNED)) >= 85 THEN 'EXCELLENT' WHEN COALESCE(rar.score_value, CAST(urf.score AS SIGNED)) >= 70 THEN 'GOOD' ELSE 'FAIR' END ), 'urgentFixCount', COALESCE(rar.urgent_issue_count, 0), 'criticalFixCount', COALESCE(rar.critical_issue_count, 0), 'optionalFixCount', COALESCE(rar.optional_issue_count, 0), 'analyzeStatus', rar.analyze_status ) AS CHAR) AS scoreJson, ( SELECT COALESCE(CONCAT('[', GROUP_CONCAT(CONCAT( '{"category":', JSON_QUOTE(sg.category), ',"skills":', sg.skills_json, '}' ) ORDER BY sg.min_sort_order, sg.min_id SEPARATOR ','), ']'), '[]') FROM ( SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(rs.category, ''), 'Other') AS category, MIN(COALESCE(rs.sort_order, 0)) AS min_sort_order, MIN(rs.id) AS min_id, CONCAT('[', GROUP_CONCAT(JSON_QUOTE(rs.skill_name) ORDER BY COALESCE(rs.sort_order, 0), rs.id SEPARATOR ','), ']') AS skills_json FROM resume_skill rs WHERE rs.resume_id = urf.resume_id AND rs.del_flag = 0 AND rs.skill_name IS NOT NULL AND rs.skill_name != '' GROUP BY COALESCE(NULLIF(rs.category, ''), 'Other') ) sg ) AS skillGroupsJson, ( SELECT COALESCE(CONCAT('[', GROUP_CONCAT(CAST(JSON_OBJECT( 'companyName', rwe.company_name, 'positionTitle', rwe.position_title, 'startDate', rwe.start_date, 'endDate', rwe.end_date, 'description', IF(JSON_VALID(rwe.description), JSON_EXTRACT(rwe.description, '$'), JSON_ARRAY()), 'sortOrder', rwe.sort_order ) AS CHAR) ORDER BY COALESCE(rwe.sort_order, 0), rwe.id SEPARATOR ','), ']'), '[]') FROM resume_work_experience rwe WHERE rwe.resume_id = urf.resume_id AND rwe.del_flag = 0 ) AS workExperiencesJson, ( SELECT COALESCE(CONCAT('[', GROUP_CONCAT(CAST(JSON_OBJECT( 'projectName', rpe.project_name, 'roleTitle', rpe.role_title, 'startDate', rpe.start_date, 'endDate', rpe.end_date, 'techStack', IF(JSON_VALID(rpe.tech_stack), JSON_EXTRACT(rpe.tech_stack, '$'), JSON_ARRAY()), 'description', IF(JSON_VALID(rpe.description), JSON_EXTRACT(rpe.description, '$'), JSON_ARRAY()), 'sortOrder', rpe.sort_order ) AS CHAR) ORDER BY COALESCE(rpe.sort_order, 0), rpe.id SEPARATOR ','), ']'), '[]') FROM resume_project_experience rpe WHERE rpe.resume_id = urf.resume_id AND rpe.del_flag = 0 ) AS projectExperiencesJson, ( SELECT COALESCE(CONCAT('[', GROUP_CONCAT(CAST(JSON_OBJECT( 'itemType', rc.item_type, 'name', rc.name, 'issuer', rc.issuer, 'issueDate', rc.issue_date, 'description', rc.description, 'credentialUrl', rc.credential_url, 'sortOrder', rc.sort_order ) AS CHAR) ORDER BY COALESCE(rc.sort_order, 0), rc.id SEPARATOR ','), ']'), '[]') FROM resume_certification rc WHERE rc.resume_id = urf.resume_id AND rc.del_flag = 0 ) AS certificationsJson FROM user_resume_file urf LEFT JOIN resume_profile rp ON rp.resume_id = urf.resume_id AND rp.user_id = urf.user_id AND rp.del_flag = 0 LEFT JOIN resume_analysis_report rar ON rar.resume_id = urf.resume_id AND rar.user_id = urf.user_id AND rar.del_flag = 0 WHERE urf.user_id = #{userId} AND urf.resume_id = #{resumeId} AND urf.del_flag = 0 LIMIT 1
